overview: Handsome Health provides personalized wellness care including medical weight loss, testosterone replacement therapy, IV hydration and vitamin therapy, neurotoxin treatments, and primary care services. Care is delivered by Jacqueline Cabrera, APRN, with both in-person and telehealth options available.
highlights: Medical weight loss with FDA-approved GLP-1 medications (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide)
Direct provider care at every visit, in-person or via telehealth
IV hydration and vitamin therapy services
targetAudience: Men and women in Rockford and Northern Illinois seeking medical weight loss, hormone therapy, or other personalized wellness services.
